creator: arensb+fbsd-patch@ooblick.com
text:
The audio/p5-CDDB port is for version 1.03 of p5-CDDB. It
comes with a patch to fetch CD information from freedb.org rather than
cddb.com.
	Version 1.04 of p5-CDDB uses freebd.org rather than cddb.com .
In fact, that's the only change between 1.03 and 1.04.
	In the "Fix" section, I've included a patch to upgrade the
port.
	Unfortunately, I don't remember the diff options that you
prefer for port updates. In this case, the only changes are:
	- Update PORTVERSION in "Makefile"
	- Delete the "files" directory
	- Update the md5 checksum in "distinfo"
